reasoning: Johannes Kaiser is currently polling in 4th or 5th place, with around 12% to 13% of the vote share just three weeks prior to the November 16, 2025 election. Candidate Jeannette Jara is securely leading polls at ~26-29%, followed by José Antonio Kast at ~22-23%. For Kaiser to win the 1st round (receive the greatest number of valid votes), he would need an unprecedented polling error of over 15 points to leapfrog three major candidates. Due to fragmentation on the right and his far-right positioning, his ceiling is likely capped, making a first-place finish extremely improbable.
